heading: Disbursement of appropriations
label: 276 Disbursement of appropriations
text: All appropriations for the Office of the Legislative Counsel shall be disbursed by the Secretary of the Senate.
notes: CodificationAs originally enacted, section provided for disbursement of one-half of appropriations for office of legislative counsel by Secretary of Senate and one-half by Clerk of House of Representatives. In view of nonapplicability of section to Speaker, employee, etc., of the House of Representatives pursuant to , set out as a note under , section has been revised to limit application to Office of the Legislative Counsel of the Senate. See for provisions relating to expenditures by Legislative Counsel of the House of Representatives.section 531 of Pub. L. 91–510section 281 of this titlesection 282c of this title
